channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists achieve quantum time reversal in groundbreaking experiment
item.description: Researchers have developed quantum control techniques that make a system appear to run backward in time through precise measurement management.

item.title: Strange LIGO signal may reveal missing link to dark matter
item.description: An unusual gravitational wave signal has revived hopes that primordial black holes, once theoretical, may soon be detectable.

item.title: Bumble bees surprise scientists by solving a classic intelligence test
item.description: Bumble bees amazed researchers by inventing a new method to reach a hidden reward without prior training. This finding adds to growing evidence of insect intelligence.

item.title: Aging muscle stem cells can be rejuvenated, but with a limitation
item.description: UCLA scientists found that a protein called NDRG1 accumulates in older muscle stem cells, slowing healing. Reversing this effect may restore youthful function.
